BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"2. I feel sad all the time.","Q1":"3. I feel my future is hopeless and will only get worse.","Q2":"3. I feel I am a total failure as a person.","Q3":"3. I can't get any pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"3. I feel guilty all of the time.","Q5":"3. I feel like I am being punished.","Q6":"3. I dislike myself.","Q7":"3. I blame myself for everything bad that happens.","Q8":"3. I would kill myself if I had the chance.","Q9":"3. I feel like crying, but I can't.","Q10":"3. I am so restless or agitated that I have to keep moving or doing something.","Q11":"3. It's hard to get interested in anything.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"3. I feel utterly worthless.","Q15":"3. I don't have enough energy to do anything.","Q16":"3-. I wake up 1-2 hours early and can't get back to sleep.","Q17":"3. I am irritable all the time.","Q18":"3+. I crave food all the time.","Q19":"3. I find I can't concentrate on anything.","Q20":"3. I am too tired or fatigued to do a most of the things I used to do.","Q21":"2. I am much less interested in sex now."}
